summary: Tested /celebrate redirect, /celebrate-soul Mira widget visibility, and all P1/P2 modal components (WallLightbox, PillarSoulModal, ProductDetailModal, DoggyServiceDesk) for useResizeMobile bottom-sheet behavior on mobile (390px) and centered behavior on desktop.

ui_bugs.issue: Could not verify via live browser - Mojo has 100% soul score so no incomplete pillars exist. Code review confirms correct implementation: className with isMobile ? 'items-start pt-20' : 'items-center justify-center px-4' at line 215. Needs test with a pet that has incomplete soul pillars.
ui_bugs.priority: LOW - code is correct, just test limitation

action_items: Optional: Verify PillarSoulModal mobile bottom-sheet live by using a pet with low soul score (e.g., Buddy at 10%). Code is confirmed correct but could not verify in browser with current test data.
critical_code_review_comments: DoggyServiceDesk.jsx correctly migrated from window.addEventListener resize to useResizeMobile(768) hook
WallLightbox.jsx: isMobile=true gives alignItems:flex-start (top-anchored) and borderRadius:20px 20px 0 0
ProductDetailModal.jsx: isMobile=true gives alignItems:flex-start, paddingTop:88px, borderRadius:20px 20px 0px 0px - correct bottom-sheet
MiraAI.jsx returns null for the orb on pillar pages - the visible Ask Mira at bottom-right on celebrate-soul is from the embedded MiraChatWidget within the page (expected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1/P2 components tested with useResizeMobile. Test results: (1) /celebrate -> /celebrate-soul redirect PASS. (2) /celebrate-soul MiraAI global orb hidden (data-testid=mira-orb-container not in DOM) PASS - embedded MiraChatWidget orb is expected. (3) WallLightbox: 390px top-anchored (flex-start, 20px 20px 0 0 corners), desktop centered PASS. (4) PillarSoulModal: code correct, untestable in browser (Mojo 100% soul). (5) ProductDetailModal: 390px bottom-sheet (flex-start, 88px padding, 20px 20px 0 0), desktop centered PASS. (6) DoggyServiceDesk: 390px sidebar collapsed, 68 tickets load, list/detail toggle PASS. (7) /celebrate/cakes goes directly to /celebrate-soul PASS. No useResizeMobile/hook/resize JS errors found.

celebrate_cakes_redirect.test: Visit /celebrate/cakes, verify it eventually lands on /celebrate-soul
celebrate_cakes_redirect.note: Direct single redirect to /celebrate-soul, no double-redirect needed

mira_widget_hidden.test: /celebrate-soul page - global MiraAI orb NOT shown
mira_widget_hidden.detail: data-testid=mira-orb-container NOT in DOM. MiraAI.jsx returns null on pillar pages. Visible Ask Mira at bottom-right is from embedded MiraChatWidget in the page (expected).

pillar_soul_modal_code.code: className={`fixed inset-0 z-50 flex ${isMobile ? 'items-start pt-20' : 'items-center justify-center px-4'}`}
pillar_soul_modal_code.reason: Mojo has 100% soul score - no incomplete pillars to click. Need Buddy (10%) or similar.

product_detail_modal_mobile.test: ProductDetailModal on 390px - bottom-sheet with rounded top corners

doggy_service_desk_mobile.test: DoggyServiceDesk on 390px - sidebar collapsed, list/detail toggle works
doggy_service_desk_mobile.details: 68 tickets loaded, Menu button visible (sidebar collapsed), clicking ticket opens detail view, useResizeMobile(768) hook active

no_hook_errors.test: No JS errors related to useResizeMobile/hooks/resize
no_hook_errors.note: Pre-existing errors: key prop warning in PetHomePage, GLOBAL SOCKET connection timeout - unrelated to current task
